---
name: Bug Report
about: Found a bug? Report it here!
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

### Describe The Bug
Describe what the bug causes to happen.

E.g. When creating a template, the tile becomes black.

### Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen or why you think the current behavior is wrong.

E.g. When I create a template, I expect the template to be overlayed on the game instead of making the game black.
E.g. The game is not supposed to become black.

### Things You Tried
Describe all of the things you tried.

E.g. I tried different templates of different sizes. I tried updating Blue Marble.

### Reproduce The Bug
What steps do you take to reproduce the bug?

E.g.
1. Load the game
2. Get the coordinates (12, 194, 193, 3)
3. Make a template at the coordinates
4. The game will become black.

### Error Message
If applicable, add any error messages you get.

E.g. Error: Coordinates are malformed! Did you try clicking on the canvas first?

### Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

### System Information
Please fill out these details about your OS, version, and browser.

- OS:
- Extension Version:
- Browser:

### Additional Information
Add any other context about the problem here.

E.g. This bug has been happening since 3.245.0
